raw: {"perspective": "Legal Advisor", "findings": [{"severity": "BLOCK", "file_or_area": "GDPR Article 22 consent flow", "issue": "Insufficient automated decision consent flow", "recommended_fix": "Implement explicit consent flow for automated decision-making processes"}, {"severity": "WARN", "file_or_area": "AZ Personal Data Protection Act compliance", "issue": "Unclear compliance status for Baku launch", "recommended_fix": "Conduct thorough compliance review and obtain necessary certifications"}, {"severity": "OK", "file_or_area": "Platform liability for AURA score usage", "issue": "No explicit legal exposure found", "recommended_fix": "Continue monitoring and reviewing platform liability"}, {"severity": "WARN", "file_or_area": "Data processor agreements (Supabase, Google Cloud, Railway)", "issue": "Incomplete or missing DPAs", "recommended_fix": "Review and finalize DPAs with all data processors"}, {"severity": "OK", "file_or_area": "Terms of Service for AI-generated assessments", "issue": "No explicit issues found", "recommended_fix": "Continue reviewing and updating ToS as necessary"}], "overall_verdict": "WARN", "whistleblower_flag": null}
